sections_extracted.extracted_content_summary: AP Physics 1: Algebra-Based Course and Exam Description, Effective Fall 2024.
Algebra-based introductory college-level physics; 8 content areas; prerequisites Geometry + concurrent Algebra II; 25% lab time.
Practice 1 Creating Representations, Practice 2 Mathematical Routines, Practice 3 Scientific Questioning and Argumentation; 10 skills total.
Unit topics and suggested pacing for all 8 units.
Unit 1 sampled in detail (topics 1.1-1.5 with suggested skills); other units mapped from Course at a Glance and TOC.
3-hour exam: 40 MCQ (Section I, 80 min, 50%) and 4 FRQ (Section II, 100 min, 50%).
Mathematical Routines, Translation Between Representations, Experimental Design and Analysis, Qualitative/Quantitative Translation.
14 task verbs commonly used in free-response questions.
Vocabulary definitions and Table of Information: Equations.
